# Dapp DeFi

> An open-source, markdown-driven directory of 500+ DeFi protocols, organized by what they actually do (lending, DEX, perps, liquid staking, restaking, RWA, etc.) rather than by chain. Every entry has an original, hand-written description, a structured tag block (governance, custody, audit status, launch year, custody model, permissions), and links out.

## Categories

- [Lending](https://dappdefi.com/categories/lending/): On-chain credit markets, money markets, CDP-style stablecoin issuers
- [Decentralized Exchanges](https://dappdefi.com/categories/dex/): AMMs, concentrated-liquidity, order books, aggregators
- [Perpetuals & Derivatives](https://dappdefi.com/categories/perps/): Perp futures, options, synthetic derivatives
- [Liquid Staking](https://dappdefi.com/categories/liquid-staking/): LSTs and pooled staking across many networks
- [Yield](https://dappdefi.com/categories/yield/): Yield aggregators, vaults, structured products, fixed-rate, leverage
- [Bridges](https://dappdefi.com/categories/bridges/): Lock-mint, liquidity-pool, messaging, intent-based
- [Stablecoins](https://dappdefi.com/categories/stablecoins/): Issuers — fiat-backed, crypto-backed, basis-trade-backed
- [Real World Assets](https://dappdefi.com/categories/rwa/): Tokenized treasuries, private credit, commodities, real estate
- [Restaking](https://dappdefi.com/categories/restaking/): ETH and BTC restaking platforms, AVS marketplaces
- [Infrastructure](https://dappdefi.com/categories/infrastructure/): Oracles, indexers, MEV, account abstraction, data tooling
- [Prediction Markets](https://dappdefi.com/categories/prediction-markets/): On-chain venues for trading event outcomes
- [NFT Finance](https://dappdefi.com/categories/nft-fi/): NFT lending, fractionalization, financial primitives
- [Gaming](https://dappdefi.com/categories/gaming/): On-chain games and gaming-adjacent finance
- [Social](https://dappdefi.com/categories/social/): Social and creator protocols with financial primitives
- [Other](https://dappdefi.com/categories/other/): Protocols that don't fit cleanly elsewhere

## Featured (homepage)

- [Rocko](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/rocko/): Consumer-friendly front-end for crypto-backed borrowing routing to Aave V3, Compound III, and Morpho
- [Kairos](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/kairos/): On-chain interest-rate-swap protocol with oracle-agnostic markets and up to 5,000x notional leverage
- [CoinFox](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/coinfox/): Crypto portfolio tracker for monitoring positions across coins and tokens
- [Aave V3](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/aave-v3/): Largest non-custodial lending protocol; isolation mode and efficiency mode across 20+ deployments
- [Morpho Blue](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/morpho-blue/): Minimalist permissionless lending primitive built around isolated markets
- [Uniswap V3](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/uniswap-v3/): Concentrated-liquidity AMM, the dominant DEX architecture
- [Curve DEX](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/curve-dex/): Canonical stable-asset DEX; pioneered the StableSwap invariant and ve-tokenomics
- [Pendle](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/pendle/): Dominant venue for trading tokenized future yield (PT/YT)
- [Lido](https://dappdefi.com/protocols/lido/): Largest liquid staking protocol on Ethereum; issues stETH

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/vinniejames/dappdefi): Open-source. PRs welcome — every protocol is a markdown file in `src/content/protocols/`.
- [Contributing guide](https://github.com/vinniejames/dappdefi#contributing--add-or-edit-your-projects-page): Template and instructions for adding or editing a project's page.
- [Compare two protocols](https://dappdefi.com/compare/): Side-by-side comparison page; supports `?a=<slug>&b=<slug>` URL params.
- [Changelog](https://dappdefi.com/changelog/): Every protocol added to the directory, grouped by month.
- [RSS feed](https://dappdefi.com/rss.xml): Recently added protocols.
